mapper.insert: INSERT INTO skill_reference (source_skill_id, target_skill_id, creator, created_at) VALUES (#{sourceSkillId}, #{targetSkillId}, #{creator}, #{createdAt})
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM skill_reference WHERE creator = #{creator} AND target_skill_id = #{skillId}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) > 0 FROM skill_reference WHERE creator = #{creator} AND target_skill_id = #{skillId}
SELECT target_skill_id FROM skill_reference WHERE creator = #{creator}
